name: agents-library
description: Stack-agnostic coding agents and orchestrator skills for PR review, design review, PR batching, issue triage, simplification, and codebase mapping.

plugins.name: agents-library
plugins.description: Seven orchestrator skills (/review-pr, /review-design, /review-ux-psychology, /batch-merge-prs, /triage-issues, /simplify-sweep, /describe-codebase) plus single-purpose coding subagents: architecture, dead code, docs, refactor, security, tests, UX polish, and visual design.
